title: cystopteris nivalis
intro: Cystopteris nivalis, also known as winter fern or snow fern, is a type of fern found in the northern hemisphere, typically growing in shaded, damp environments. The medicinal properties of Cystopteris nivalis include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and protect against infections. Cystopteris nivalis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile remedy in traditional medicine.
